overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a sunny suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The player moves along sidewalks past palm trees, residential homes, and Dynasty 8 real estate signs, crosses an intersection with pedestrians, and continues toward a more rural area with hills and construction fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with real estate signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past green lawns and palm trees

entered.detail: large green real estate sign with yellow logos and 'FOR SALE' text
tall palm trees lining the street
gray concrete sidewalk tiles with grass verges
multi-lane asphalt street with vehicle traffic
wooden utility pole with power lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny suburban sidewalk with Dynasty 8 real estate signs visible on the left. The camera moves forward along the concrete path, passing well-maintained lawns and palm trees, with residential homes and a multi-lane road visible.

events.description: approaching and entering the intersection crosswalk from the sidewalk
pedestrians crossing the street in various directions

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection alongside other pedestrians while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in purple shirt taking a photo with phone while crossing the street
classic black muscle car parked at the corner near the crosswalk

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the corner
large black billboard with white text
classic two-door muscle car with black paint and chrome details

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses the street alongside pedestrians. A yellow fire hydrant and parked muscle car mark the corner, while a commercial billboard rises in the background. Pedestrians including a person taking photos cross in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked classic car

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the sky, clouds, and palm tree tops
camera returns to forward-facing position and continues walking

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the parked muscle car, briefly looking up at the sky

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along the residential sidewalk, passing the parked muscle car which recedes into the distance. The camera briefly tilts upward to capture the palm trees against the cloudy sky before returning to street level and passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban edge with wooden fencing and hillside views

events.description: transition from dense residential to more open area with wooden fencing and visible hills

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with wooden fence on the left and hills visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running parallel to the sidewalk
grassy hillside with rocky outcrops in the background

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more open suburban edge with a wooden fence appearing on the left and grassy hills rising in the background. The sidewalk continues past scattered residential homes and palm trees, with the urban density decreasing.

events.description: blue construction fence comes into view on the left side, replacing the wooden fence

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to the blue construction barrier, approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall blue metal construction fence with barbed wire on top

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a blue construction fence running along the left side of the sidewalk, creating a more enclosed corridor. The camera continues walking past palm trees with hills still visible in the distance, encountering a pedestrian in a yellow dress walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunny suburban neighborhood that gradually transitions from a dense residential area to an open suburban edge. It begins on a concrete sidewalk passing Dynasty 8 real estate signs and manicured lawns before moving toward a wide urban intersection. As the camera crosses the street alongside pedestrians and passes a yellow fire hydrant and a parked muscle car, the view briefly tilts upward toward palm trees against a cloudy sky. The scene then opens up as the urban density decreases, shifting from residential homes to a landscape of wooden fences and rising grassy hills in the distance. Finally, the path becomes a more enclosed corridor defined by a blue construction fence, continuing past palm trees and a pedestrian in a yellow dress.
